skills.name: Critical Element
skills.description: Increases elemental damage (fire, water, thunder, ice, dragon) when landing critical hits.

levels.description: Increases elemental damage (fire, water, thunder, ice, dragon) when landing critical hits.

skills.name: Mind's Eye/Ballistics
skills.description: Prevents attacks from being deflected. Also shortens the distance before ammo and arrows reach maximum power.

levels.description: Prevents attacks from being deflected. Also shortens the distance before ammo and arrows reach maximum power.

skills.name: Critical Boost
skills.description: Increases the damage of critical hits.

levels.description: Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 30%.
Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 35%.
Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 40%.

skills.name: Intimidator
skills.description: Reduces the chances small monsters will attack after spotting you. (No effect on certain monsters.)

levels.description: Discourages monsters from engaging you even if you've been spotted.
Highly discourages monsters from engaging you even if you've been spotted.
Prevents monsters from engaging you even if you've been spotted.

skills.name: Free Elem/Ammo Up
skills.description: Unlocks your weapon's hidden element. Also increases bowgun loading capacity. (There is a cap to loading capacity.)

levels.description: Draws out 33% of hidden element and expands clip size for some ammo.
Draws out 66% of hidden element and expands clip size for many ammo.
Draws out 100% of hidden element and expands clip size for most ammo.

skills.name: Intimidator
skills.description: Reduces the chances small monsters will attack after spotting you. (No effect on certain monsters.)

levels.description: Discourages monsters from engaging you even if you've been spotted.
Highly discourages monsters from engaging you even if you've been spotted.
Prevents monsters from engaging you even if you've been spotted.

skills.name: Focus
skills.description: Increases the fill rate for weapons with gauges and the charge rate for weapons with charge attacks.

levels.description: Increases gauge fill rate by 5% and reduces charge times by 5%.
Increases gauge fill rate by 10% and reduces charge times by 10%.
Increases gauge fill rate by 20% and reduces charge times by 15%.

skills.name: Windproof
skills.description: Grants protection against wind pressure.

levels.description: Slightly reduces the effects of minor wind pressure.
Reduces the effects of minor wind pressure.
Negates minor wind pressure.
Negates minor wind pressure and reduces the effects of major wind pressure.
Negates minor and major wind pressure.

skills.name: Windproof
skills.description: Grants protection against wind pressure.

levels.description: Slightly reduces the effects of minor wind pressure.
Reduces the effects of minor wind pressure.
Negates minor wind pressure.
Negates minor wind pressure and reduces the effects of major wind pressure.
Negates minor and major wind pressure.

skills.name: Piercing Shots
skills.description: Increases the attack power of piercing ammo and Dragon Piercer.

levels.description: Increases the power of piercing ammo and Dragon Piercer.
Greatly increases the power of piercing ammo and Dragon Piercer.

levels.description: Increases gauge fill rate by 5% and reduces charge times by 5%.
Increases gauge fill rate by 10% and reduces charge times by 10%.
Increases gauge fill rate by 20% and reduces charge times by 15%.

skills.name: Cliffhanger
skills.description: Decreases stamina depletion when evading while clinging to walls or ivy, or when moving while grappling onto an enemy.

levels.description: Reduces stamina depletion while climbing by 50%.

skills.name: Agitator
skills.description: Increases attack power and affinity when large monsters become enraged.

levels.description: While active, grants attack +4 and increases affinity by 5%.
While active, grants attack +8 and increases affinity by 5%.
While active, grants attack +12 and increases affinity by 7%.
While active, grants attack +16 and increases affinity by 7%.
While active, grants attack +20 and increases affinity by 10%.
While active, grants attack +24 and increases affinity by 15%.
While active, grants attack +28 and increases affinity by 20%.

skills.name: Handicraft
skills.description: Extends the weapon sharpness gauge. However, it will not increase the gauge past its maximum.

levels.description: Weapon sharpness +10
